productDisplayName: Indigo Nation Men Orange Check Black Ties
description: With a checkered black, white and orange in broad and narrow checks, this tie from indigo nation is a perfect match for a variety of dress shirts - from classic white to black and grey. Length: 153 cm Made of 100% handmade microfibre for durability and easy use Has broad and narrow white, orange and black checks One loop with brand badge on the inner of the broad tongue to hold the narrow tongue in place Tie care only dry clean
